name: spawntree-daemon
description: Native daemon resolver and build shim for spawntree

scripts.build:binaries: mkdir -p bin && for target in darwin/amd64 darwin/arm64 linux/amd64 linux/arm64 windows/amd64 windows/arm64; do GOOS=${target%/*}; GOARCH=${target#*/}; EXT=''; if [ "$GOOS" = 'windows' ]; then EXT='.exe'; fi; GOOS="$GOOS" GOARCH="$GOARCH" go build -o "bin/spawntreed-$GOOS-$GOARCH$EXT" ../../cmd/spawntreed; done
scripts.verify:binaries: for file in bin/spawntreed-darwin-amd64 bin/spawntreed-darwin-arm64 bin/spawntreed-linux-amd64 bin/spawntreed-linux-arm64 bin/spawntreed-windows-amd64.exe bin/spawntreed-windows-arm64.exe; do test -f "$file"; done
scripts.verify:pack: pkg=$(npm pack --silent); tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-darwin-amd64$' >/dev/null && tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-darwin-arm64$' >/dev/null && tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-linux-amd64$' >/dev/null && tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-linux-arm64$' >/dev/null && tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-windows-amd64.exe$' >/dev/null && tar -tzf "$pkg" | rg 'package/bin/spawntreed-windows-arm64.exe$' >/dev/null && rm -f "$pkg"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:binaries && pnpm run verify:binaries && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: EXT=''; GOOS=$(go env GOOS); GOARCH=$(go env GOARCH); if [ "$GOOS" = 'windows' ]; then EXT='.exe'; fi; mkdir -p bin && GOOS="$GOOS" GOARCH="$GOARCH" go build -o "bin/spawntreed-$GOOS-$GOARCH$EXT" ../../cmd/spawntreed
